facts.description: At least three public sources are used.
facts.source: web search results and source labels in final image
facts.source_section: web search results and source labels in final image
facts.semantic_acceptance: The image should visibly label at least three sources or include source labels sufficient to identify them.

facts.description: At least two sources are formal research/paper sources.
facts.source: web search results and source labels in final image
facts.source_section: web search results and source labels in final image
facts.expected_value: At least two paper PDFs, arXiv/preprint PDFs, conference paper pages, journal article pages, or formal paper pages
facts.semantic_acceptance: Do not count Wikipedia, blogs, news, or press releases toward this paper-source minimum.

facts.description: Source titles and URLs or compact URL cues are visible.
facts.expected_value: Three source labels with titles/authors and URLs/domains/venues
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept compact labels such as author/year + arXiv, journal, DOI, .gov, or URL cue.

facts.expected_value: A synthesized public title about flood adaptation equity or climate-health vulnerability
facts.semantic_acceptance: Must not simply copy a single paper title.

facts.expected_value: A one-sentence problem statement about flood adaptation equity or climate-health vulnerability

facts.description: Exactly three cross-paper insights grounded in multiple sources.
facts.expected_value: Exactly three insights that synthesize across sources rather than summarizing one source
facts.semantic_acceptance: Each insight should be traceable to at least one credible source, and collectively the three should draw on multiple sources.

facts.description: Method or dataset comparison across sources.
facts.expected_value: A comparison of methods, datasets, study regions, populations, or vulnerability measures across sources
A limitation or uncertainty about methods, scope, causality, generalization, or data coverage
A practical takeaway for public communication or planning that follows from the sources
No CTA required; if included, it should point to the listed sources or further reading without inventing a deadline.

expected_value: numeric claims not tied to a cited source

web_facts.description: The agent must locate and use at least three public sources about flood adaptation equity and climate-health vulnerability.
At least two sources must be formal paper or PDF-style research sources.

calculation_notes: This is a web_required document_brief case. The evaluator should not expect one fixed set of source titles or insight wording. Required checks are source count, source quality, visible source labels/URLs, exactly three grounded cross-paper insights, method/dataset comparison, limitation, public takeaway, and no unsupported numeric or policy overclaims.
